creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Alexander Churanov <alexanderchuranov@gmail.com> writes:

> The suggested changes in devel/boost-jam are included in the patch and
> will be checked in as a part of update process. Current (not final,
> probably) version of patch is here:
> http://alexanderchuranov.com/boost-port/boost-145-to-148-v03.diff

Mind also respecting LDFLAGS ? It could be used by -flto or libc++.
For example, boost-libs builds fine here with libc++ if I apply #4999.

  http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?55EF58C0-0E9A-4701-B309-95317913A384
  https://svn.boost.org/trac/boost/ticket/4999
